skills.name: brownfield-compress
skills.description: Investigate a codebase and produce a compression artifact for downstream planning. The Research step.

skills.name: post-council-handoff
skills.description: Execution entry-point anchor after plan decomposition. Translates a decomposed Tempor plan into a kickoff-ready frame, then hands off to lifecycle execution.

skills.name: plan-execution-lifecycle
skills.description: Execution orchestration for Tempor-generated plans. Kickoff, waves, gates, closeout ceremonies. The Implement step.

skills.name: git-commit-workflow
skills.description: Commit discipline, staging, hook remediation. Required by plan-execution-lifecycle.

skills.name: pulse-save
skills.description: Save handoff snapshot for the next agent/context window.

skills.name: pulse-resume
skills.description: Resume from a previous agent's handoff snapshot.

skills.name: content-notes-build-in-public
skills.description: Build-in-public content generation. Not portable — specific to tempor_codex.

bootstrap_note: To bootstrap portable skills into a new workspace: read this manifest, filter for portable: true, and cp -r each skill directory into <target>/.agents/skills/. The init flow can automate this. For Claude Code, native shims should be projected into <target>/.claude/commands/<skill>.md, but .agents/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md remains the canonical source of truth.
